overall.description: Spider-Man crouches on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square intersection in this video game footage. The character observes the traffic and pedestrians below while remaining stationary, with bright sunlight illuminating the glass towers and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: Times Square skyscraper ledge overlooking busy intersection

events.description: Blue public transit bus enters from right side and moves across the intersection below
Spider-Man shifts weight from crouched position to leaning forward slightly

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crouches on the building ledge, surveying the city traffic and pedestrians below while remaining perched

notable_agents.action: Blue city bus moving leftward across the intersection through traffic

entered.detail: Glass and steel building facade with vertical architectural lines, the perch location
Large digital billboards and colorful advertisements covering building faces across the street
Tall glass skyscraper with multiple illuminated digital screens on the facade
Multi-lane street intersection with marked crosswalks visible below

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man is perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square intersection. The scene features towering glass buildings covered in vivid digital billboards, with moderate traffic including a blue bus moving through the intersection below. The character remains mostly stationary in a crouched position, observing the urban activity from the elevated vantage point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective from a skyscraper ledge overlooking the vibrant chaos of a Times Square intersection. It begins with Spider-Man perched in a crouched position, observing the urban activity from a high vantage point. As the camera lingers, the view encompasses towering glass buildings draped in vivid digital billboards that bathe the scene in bright light. The perspective then settles on the street level below, where moderate traffic and a blue bus navigate the bustling intersection.
